conclusion: Grapefruit may affect metformin absorption and efficacy
advice: Avoid grapefruit and grapefruit juice while taking metformin

conclusion: Alcohol increases the risk of lactic acidosis with metformin
advice: Avoid alcohol consumption while taking metformin

conclusion: Lisinopril increases potassium levels; bananas are high in potassium
advice: Limit high-potassium foods like bananas while taking lisinopril

conclusion: Salt substitutes contain potassium which can cause dangerous hyperkalemia
advice: Never use salt substitutes while taking lisinopril

conclusion: Spinach is high in vitamin K which counteracts warfarin
advice: Maintain consistent vitamin K intake; avoid sudden increases in leafy greens

conclusion: Grapefruit can increase warfarin levels and bleeding risk
advice: Avoid grapefruit while taking warfarin

conclusion: Garlic may increase the anticoagulant effect of warfarin
advice: Use garlic in moderation while on warfarin

conclusion: Grapefruit significantly increases simvastatin levels causing muscle damage risk
advice: Completely avoid grapefruit and grapefruit juice with simvastatin

conclusion: Grapefruit may increase amlodipine blood levels
advice: Avoid grapefruit while taking amlodipine

conclusion: High fiber foods help stabilize blood sugar alongside metformin
advice: Include high fiber foods in your diet

conclusion: Oxalates in spinach can reduce calcium absorption
advice: Take calcium supplements separately from spinach-containing meals

conclusion: Coffee can reduce levothyroxine absorption by up to 36%
advice: Take levothyroxine at least 30 minutes before coffee

conclusion: Dairy products reduce ciprofloxacin absorption
advice: Avoid dairy 2 hours before and after taking ciprofloxacin

conclusion: Alcohol increases the risk of stomach bleeding with aspirin
advice: Avoid alcohol while taking aspirin

conclusion: Carrots are low-glycemic and complement metformin therapy
advice: Carrots are a good food choice while on metformin

conclusion: Omega-3 in fish may complement blood pressure management
advice: Fish is a good dietary choice while on lisinopril

conclusion: Fish oil may increase bleeding risk when combined with aspirin
advice: Consult your doctor about fish oil supplements while on aspirin

conclusion: Orange juice may reduce metoprolol absorption
advice: Avoid orange juice close to metoprolol dosing time

conclusion: Grapefruit increases diazepam levels causing excessive sedation
advice: Avoid grapefruit while taking diazepam

conclusion: Coffee tannins inhibit iron absorption by up to 60%
advice: Take iron supplements at least 1 hour before or 2 hours after coffee
